## HydrationDiagnostic.formatBindingMismatch() method

Format a binding-resolution mismatch (a factory whose `targetNodeId` has no entry in the resolved targets after the SSR DOM walk).

**Signature:**

```typescript
formatBindingMismatch(factory: ViewBehaviorFactory, firstChild: Node, lastChild: Node, hostName: string | undefined): HydrationDiagnosticResult;
```
